description: Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds

nodes.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 1.98 (foreground color: #ffffff, background color: #80cc28, font size: 12.0pt (16px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1

description: Ensure elements that have scrollable content are accessible by keyboard

nodes.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  Element should have focusable content
  Element should be focusable

description: Ensure touch targets have sufficient size and space

nodes.failureSummary:

  Target has insufficient size (517px by 18.6px, should be at least 24px by 24px)
  Target has insufficient space to its closest neighbors. Safe clickable space has a diameter of 22.8px instead of at least 24px.
